name: Meridian Energy Limited
analysis: MEZ's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.8600, stop A$4.6134, target A$5.5998 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
